items.title_zh: OpenAI 推出 Rosalind Biodefense，向联邦机构提供生命科学模型早期访问

items.why_zh: 此举标志着 OpenAI 将 AI 技术应用于生物防御领域，可能提升国家安全与公共卫生应对能力。
items.why_en: This marks OpenAI's application of AI in biodefense, potentially enhancing national security and public health response.

items.title_zh: 独家：OpenAI 启动生物防御计划

items.why_en: This program shows OpenAI's strategic focus on AI safety and biosecurity.

items.title_zh: Anthropic 融资 650 亿美元，估值逼近万亿，超越 OpenAI

items.why_en: This marks a major shift in AI competition, with Anthropic emerging as a new leader.

items.why_en: This framework provides standardized tools for AI governance, helping enterprises address AI security and compliance challenges.

items.summary_en: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.
items.why_zh: 这标志着对话式 AI 从聊天机器人向更人性化交互的演进，可能改变人机交流方式。
items.why_en: This marks the evolution of conversational AI towards more human-like interactions, potentially changing human-computer communication.

items.why_en: Trust is paramount in banking; authenticity is key to countering misinformation.

items.summary_en: Pope Leo XIV’s new encyclical on artificial intelligence includes a statement that warrants serious attention from technologists and policymakers: “Technology is never neutral.” Magnifica Humanitas (“Magnificent Humanity…

items.why_en: The encyclical provides an ethical framework for individuals to maintain humanity in the AI era, with far-reaching implications.

items.summary_en: It explained the process of how it made these edits beautifully, I’m just not terribly impressed by the results. | Images by Jess Weatherbed / The Verge AI image tools rarely make me feel like I'm part of the creative pr…

items.why_en: This highlights the current limitations of AI in creative fields, where it cannot yet replace human creativity.

items.title_zh: 开源安全防护模型基准测试：全面评估
items.title_en: Benchmarking Open-Source Safety Guard Models: A Comprehensive Evaluation
items.summary_zh: 随着 LLM 在安全关键型应用中的部署，稳健的内容审核变得至关重要。本文对开源安全防护模型进行了全面评估。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.28830v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications, robust content moderation becomes essential. We present a comprehensive evaluat…
items.why_zh: 该研究为选择可靠的内容安全模型提供了基准，对 AI 安全部署至关重要。
items.why_en: This study provides benchmarks for selecting reliable content safety models, crucial for safe AI deployment.

items.title_zh: 进化搜索中的计算分配：从深度广度到多臂老虎机
items.title_en: Compute Allocation in Evolutionary Search: From Depth-Breadth to Multi-Armed Bandits
items.summary_zh: LLM 引导的进化搜索在数学和组合任务上取得了最先进成果，但现有系统仅报告最佳结果。本文研究了计算分配策略。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29268v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: LLM-guided evolutionary search (Evolve systems) has reached state-of-the-art results on mathematical and combinatorial tasks, yet most existing systems report only the be…
items.why_zh: 优化计算分配可显著提升进化搜索的效率，对 AI 自动发现算法有重要意义。
items.why_en: Optimizing compute allocation can significantly improve the efficiency of evolutionary search, important for AI-driven algorithmic discovery.

items.title_zh: CodeEvolve：用于算法发现和优化的开源进化编码智能体
items.title_en: CodeEvolve: an open source evolutionary coding agent for algorithmic discovery and optimization
items.summary_zh: CodeEvolve 是一个开源框架，将大语言模型与基于岛屿的进化搜索相结合，用于端到端的算法发现。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2510.14150v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We introduce CodeEvolve, an open-source framework that couples large language models with island-based evolutionary search for end-to-end algorithmic discovery. CodeEvo…
items.why_zh: 该框架为自动化算法发现提供了强大工具，有望加速 AI 研究。
items.why_en: This framework provides a powerful tool for automated algorithmic discovery, potentially accelerating AI research.

items.title_zh: 异构带宽预算下联邦探针-对数蒸馏的匹配率与最优分配
items.title_en: Matching Rates and Optimal Allocation for Federated Probe-Logit Distillation under Heterogeneous Bandwidth Budgets
items.summary_zh: 在联邦语言建模中，K 个节点各持有 n 个样本，但不能共享数据或全精度梯度。本文研究了在异构带宽下的最优分配。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29642v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In federated language modeling, $K$ nodes each hold $n$ samples but cannot pool data or exchange full-precision gradients or weights. We study the minimax rate at which a…
items.why_zh: 该研究为联邦学习中的通信效率优化提供了理论指导，对分布式 AI 训练至关重要。
items.why_en: This research provides theoretical guidance for communication efficiency optimization in federated learning, crucial for distributed AI training.

items.why_en: This reveals how AI tools can be abused to spread malware, posing a new security threat to users.
